subject: feat(cashflow): pivot from budgeting to cashflow app with income tracking
body:
Add income/expense type system, starting balance, cashflow engine, and
running balance forecast. This transforms the app from expense-only budgeting
to full cashflow management where users can track both money in and money out.

Data model:
- Add LineType = 'income' | 'expense' and type field to Expense
- Rename Budget.totalBudget → startingBalance (cashflow semantics)
- DB schema v3 migration preserves existing data

Engines:
- Projection engine extended with monthlyIncome, monthlyNet, totalIncome, totalNet
- New cashflow.ts: running balance, zero-crossing detection, income/expense breakdown
- Envelope engine updated to use startingBalance

UI:
- ExpenseForm: income/expense toggle (red/green with icons)
- New CashflowTab: summary cards, monthly balance table, bar chart forecast
- ProjectedTab: income rows in green, section headers, income/expense/net footer
- ExpensesTab: income badge, green amounts, income/expense monthly summary
- BudgetDetailView: 4 tabs (Expenses, Projected, Cashflow, Compare)

Compatibility:
- Import handles both old totalBudget and new startingBalance exports
- Import adds type: 'expense' default for old exports missing the field

Tests: 86 across 7 files (was 75) — 8 new cashflow tests, 3 projection income tests

Tags: cashflow, income, projection, engine, ui, migration
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cashflow-pivot
Semver: minor
